name: AddToCart
promptSpec:
Process AddToCart(customer, product) -> (ok, inventory, price_keys, inventory)

FSF specification:
if (customer gt 0) => ok eq 1
if (product eq 0) => ok eq 0
others => ok eq 0

name: Checkout
promptSpec:
Process Checkout(customer, total) -> (receipt, inventory, price_keys, inventory)

FSF specification:
if (total eq 0) => receipt eq 0
others => receipt eq 0

name: Refund
promptSpec:
Process Refund(order, amount) -> (cleared)

FSF specification:
if (order gt 0) => cleared eq 1
if (order eq 0) => cleared eq 0
others => cleared eq 0

name: ShipOrder
promptSpec:
Process ShipOrder(order, region) -> (shipped, inventory, inventory)

FSF specification:
if (order gt 0) => shipped eq 1
others => shipped eq 0

name: DrainQueue
promptSpec:
Process DrainQueue(remaining, backlog) -> (result)

FSF specification:
if (backlog gt 0) => remaining eq backlog - 1
others => remaining eq 0

name: Authorize
promptSpec:
Process Authorize(customer, amount) -> (ok)

FSF specification:
if (amount gt 0) => ok eq 1
if (amount eq 0) => ok eq 0
others => ok eq 0

name: manualseed_telecomseverity
promptSpec:
Process ManualSeed_TelecomSeverity(link_down, latency, packet_loss) -> (severity)

FSF specification:
if (link_down eq 1) => severity eq 3
if (packet_loss ge 5) => severity eq 2
if (latency gt 8) => severity eq 1
others => severity eq 0
